creator: vincent.jancso@outlook.com
text:
Update: I got the host to panic with a kernel debug build. Same stack trace on multiple hosts.

panic: rw_rlock: wlock already held for tcpinp @ /usr/src/sys/netinet/in_pcb.c:2529
cpuid = 6
time = 1700228046
